title: Fresh Animations Patch - Variants and Ventures
description: A Fresh Animations patch pack that allows "Variants & Ventures" to function with "Fresh Animations".
body:
Model and texture edit patch to make the mobs in [Variants & Ventures](https://modrinth.com/mod/variants-and-ventures) compatible with the latest [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) formatting.

The pack includes edits of the mod's mob textures as well as edits of Fresh Animations' models and animations.

Optifine /or/ EntityModelTextures+EntityModelFeatures is required for the model to function. Make sure this pack is placed /above/ Fresh Animations.
